data.title: Binance Futures API now supports Chinese trading pair names
data.description: Binance Futures API now supports Chinese trading pair names

data.title: Arthur Hayes says Trump and Xi are pumping Bitcoin harder than any halving ever could
data.description:
Arthur Hayes has declared that the rise of Bitcoin today has less to do with its programmed halvings and more to do with what Donald Trump and Xi Jinping are doing with their currencies right now. In his latest essay, “Long Live the King,” the crypto trader says he thinks every society still fights over […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/arthur-hayes-trump-xi-are-pumping-bitcoin/

data.title: Avantis initiates AVNT systematic repurchase program
data.description: Avantis announced the launch of a transparent milestone-based buyback program for AVNT tokens. When the platform's average daily revenue reaches $200,000, 30% of the fees will be allocated for buybacks, exceeding $22 million annualized. When average daily revenue exceeds $500,000, the buyback ratio will increase to 50%, exceeding $90 million annualized, representing approximately 11.4% of the token supply. At that point, AVNT will enter a deflationary phase, fully offsetting the Q3 airdrop. The team stated that this mechanism aims to balance protocol growth with token value accumulation. Since the September TGE, the platform's TVL and open interest have increased sixfold.

data.title: BNB Chain Achieves Milestone with Record Gas Usage
data.description: According to PANews, BNB Chain has reached a significant milestone with its daily gas usage surpassing 5 trillion. This achievement was primarily driven by 24 million swap transactions, which accounted for 77% of the network's total transaction volume. Additionally, the standard gas price of 0.05 Gwei has been fully adopted across the entire BNB ecosystem.

data.title: Ripple Expands Middle East Presence Through Bahrain Partnership
data.description: According to PANews, Ripple is enhancing its influence in the Middle East by forming a new partnership with Bahrain Fintech Bay, a leading fintech incubator and ecosystem platform in the Kingdom of Bahrain. This initiative is part of Ripple's strategy to integrate blockchain and stablecoin infrastructure into regulated financial markets. Under the agreement, Ripple and Bahrain Fintech Bay will collaborate on pilot projects, educational programs, and local accelerator initiatives. These efforts aim to expand the use cases for digital assets, including asset tokenization, cross-border payments, and stablecoin applications.

data.title: QumulusAI secures $500 million blockchain-backed credit line to expand AI computing infrastructure
data.description: QumulusAI, a company building GPU-based cloud infrastructure for artificial intelligence, has secured a $500 million credit line to fund its growing GPU fleet. The financing was arranged by Permian Labs and will be distributed through the blockchain-based credit protocol USD.AI. The company said the non-recourse credit facility will allow QumulusAI to borrow up to 70% of the value of its approved GPU deployments in stablecoins. This approach allows the company to obtain funding faster than traditional credit routes such as bank loans or venture debt. (CoinDesk)

data.title: BNB Surpasses 1,280 USDT with a Narrowed 2.69% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Oct 09, 2025, 10:46 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 1,280 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 1,280.849976 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 2.69% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Japanese listed company Remixpoint increased its holdings by 3.22 bitcoins, bringing its total holdings to 1,374.68 bitcoins.
data.description: According to BitcoinTreasuries.NET, Japanese listed company Remixpoint (3825.T) increased its holdings by 3.22 bitcoins, and currently holds a total of 1,374.68 bitcoins.

data.title: A whale pledged $26.68 million in ETH to ETH2.0
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, a whale has pledged 6,098 ETH (worth $26.68 million) to ETH 2.0 after six years of inactivity. This whale (0x349...5270) initially received 6,203 ETH (worth $2.77 million) from Kraken and Bitfinex, and has thus far realized a profit of $24.29 million.

data.title: He Yi: The Meme ranking is for reference only. The token rating is a comprehensive calculation of multi-dimensional data.
data.description: In response to a community user's question about "Meme Rush's market data trailing BNB Holder in the Meme Rankings, yet it still ranks first," He Yi stated, "Official: Token rankings only reflect the relative performance of Binance's exclusive tokens and do not represent any listing advantages. Token ratings are calculated based on a comprehensive analysis of market capitalization, price, holdings, and trading activity. Customer service representative He Yi stated: Don't focus on rankings; they are for reference only."

data.title: Plasma Network DeFi TVL surpasses Tron Network, with a daily increase of over 17%
data.description: According to DefiLlama data, the Plasma network's DeFi TVL surpassed the Tron network, temporarily reporting $6.372 billion, with a daily increase of 17.77%.

data.title: Ethereum L2 network transaction volume hits record high in Q3
data.description: Data from everstake.eth shows that the Ethereum L2 network's transaction volume reached 1.4 billion in the third quarter, setting a record high.

data.title: Global Digital Asset Fund Inflows Surpass Last Year's Total
data.description: According to PANews, James Butterfill, Head of Research at CoinShares, announced on the X platform that global digital asset fund inflows have reached $48.67 billion so far this year, surpassing the total amount for the entire previous year. Currently, the inflows into altcoins appear to be limited to SOL and XRP.

data.title: A whale opened a three-fold order worth $10.13 million in BNB five days ago, and currently has a floating profit of over $1 million.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, the whale (0 x 2 a 02...cde 8) opened a 3x long position of 7,957 BNB 5 days ago, worth US$10.13 million, and currently has unrealized profits of more than US$1 million.

data.title: QumulusAI Secures $500 Million Credit Line for GPU Investments
data.description: According to BlockBeats, cloud infrastructure company QumulusAI has secured a $500 million credit line to invest in GPU equipment clusters. These GPUs are arranged by Permian Labs and distributed through USD.AI. This non-recourse credit line allows QumulusAI to borrow stablecoins using up to 70% of its approved GPU deployments as collateral, offering a faster funding option compared to traditional bank loans or venture debt.

data.title: The 47th SUN token buyback and destruction is completed
data.description: According to an official announcement from SUN.io, the 47th SUN token buyback and burn has been successfully completed. Between September 4, 2025, and October 9, 2025 (Singapore time), a total of 5,211,127.1873 SUN tokens were destroyed and transferred to a blackhole address for permanent destruction, further reducing the circulating supply of SUN. Since December 15, 2021 (Singapore time), a total of 646,474,398.98 SUN tokens have been repurchased and burned. This buyback and burn program has effectively reduced the total circulating supply of SUN tokens, enhancing market awareness of the token's scarcity and laying a sustainable foundation for its value growth.

data.title: Binance Launches HEMI Token Reward Campaign on CreatorPad
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, a new campaign on CreatorPad is set to offer 600,000 Hemi (HEMI) token voucher rewards to verified users who complete specific tasks. CreatorPad, a feature on Binance Square, allows users to earn token rewards by engaging in various activities. The campaign runs from 2025-10-09 09:00 (UTC) to 2025-11-10 09:00 (UTC). As of 2025-07-17, CreatorPad introduced a Mindshare Leaderboard to evaluate the quality of user-generated content. Higher quality and consistent posts will result in better rankings.

To participate, verified Binance users must complete tasks to unlock a share of 540,000 HEMI in token vouchers. Additionally, 60,000 HEMI token vouchers are reserved for the top 50 creators on the Square Creator Leaderboard, based on rankings at the campaign's start. Participants must complete Tasks 1 through 4 and choose between Tasks 5, 6, or 7 to qualify for the 540,000 HEMI reward pool. Tasks include following project accounts on Binance Square and X, creating content with specific hashtags, and trading a minimum of $10 equivalent in HEMI on Binance Spot, Futures, or Convert.

The reward structure ranks eligible users based on the last 30 days of leaderboard results at the campaign's end. The top 100 creators on the HEMI 30D Project Leaderboard will share 420,000 HEMI, while remaining participants will share 120,000 HEMI. An additional 60,000 HEMI is allocated for the top 50 creators on the Square Creator Leaderboard, divided into three ranking groups. Participants must maintain their campaign-related posts for 60 days post-campaign. Binance reserves the right to disqualify users who violate guidelines or engage in suspicious activities.

data.title: PancakeSwap: Reducing CAKE Supply for 25 Consecutive Months
data.description: PancakeSwap announced on the X platform that it has reduced the supply of CAKE tokens for 25 consecutive months, destroying a total of 3,191,963 CAKE tokens, worth approximately $12 million.

data.title: The floating loss of "Big Brother Maji"'s XPL long position was nearly 10 million US dollars, and the liquidation price was 0.5755 US dollars.
data.description: According to on-chain data, "Big Brother Maji"'s XPL long position saw a nearly $10 million floating loss, with the liquidation price at $0.5755. Furthermore, long positions in ETH, HYPE, ASTER, and PUMP all saw floating losses exceeding $1 million.
